_meta.description: Expert-validated scenarios for evaluating the free-text classifier. Each 'text' is a realistic business description; 'expected' is the entity id a domain expert would route it to. Expand this set as you validate more cases against IFSCA rules.

cases.text: We want to launch a venture capital fund investing in Indian startups
Raising a private equity fund pooling money from institutional LPs
We run a portfolio management and advisory business
A hedge fund manager looking to set up an investment scheme
Our existing bank wants a foreign-currency lending branch
We do trade finance and treasury operations for global clients
Looking to offer remittances and deposits in foreign currency
We need a captive in-house centre doing analytics for our banking group
Shared services and technology operations supporting only our own group
Back office and middle office support for our financial services parent
We lease aircraft to airlines and want to own the assets here
Ship leasing and sale-and-leaseback of vessels
Equipment leasing and asset-backed financing business
We are a reinsurer wanting to write reinsurance in foreign currency
Setting up a direct insurance underwriting operation
Insurance intermediation and web aggregation insurtech
Building a digital lending neobank app with a sandbox
We are a wealthtech robo-advisory startup seeking innovation support
A regtech platform that wants lower entry barriers to test our product
We want to broker and deal securities on the IFSC exchange
Providing custody and clearing for securities trades
Depository participant and capital markets intermediary services
Trading stocks and securities as a broker-dealer
Pooling investor capital to run an ESG investment fund
Foreign currency credit and lending unit of our parent bank
